review_title: oracle is without doubt the best tool for automation
description: from my own experience I highly recommend oracles to users
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like its automation feature.it also allows to have real time information.very useful for those who do business
cons: for me oracles works well I haven't found any complication yet

author: Patrick D.
pros: Very powerful tool. Easy to use and many great features for easy day to day management of customer interactions
cons: Some of the reporting is lacking when it comes to integrations with "other" Oracle products. ie: OService Cloud -> Oracle Digital Assistant. Lacking regarding availability of training for extending widgets / customizing Oracle Intelligent Advisor interviews.

review_title: Rich with features if used in conjunction with correct business processors
author: Jay J.
pros: Wide range of features Stability pf the application Process centric, hence no loose ends local support
cons: Slow migration to next gen technologies including mobile apps Cost Harder to find contract based expertise for support activities unless if you get resources via reputed organisations

author: David R.
pros: ease of use in collaboration amongst teammates. Real time data is crucial for our business.
cons: no cons at the moment, haven't had any issues really

author: Jorge M.
pros: Once you learn to use a feature, it greatly facilitates the job.
cons: Sometimes bureaucratic and not very user friendly.

author: Shalu B.
pros: Easy to access the material due to the good organization. Helpful in the completion of the task quickly. Make communication effective.
cons: I have not faced any problem with this software rather by using this software I am getting efficiency in my work completion.
